title: bupleurum brachyactis
intro: Bupleurum brachyactis, also known as Chinese thorowax or short-actuated hare's ear, is a flowering plant in the carrot family native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum brachyactis include reducing fever, relieving stress and anxiety, and supporting the immune system. Bupleurum brachyactis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as dried roots, capsules, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including hepatitis and bronchitis.
